name: testCheckMerchantIdAsTestAdmin
description: Correct merchant ID is sent to the server
descriptionHtml: Correct merchant ID is sent to the server

steps.name: Login to the site as 'Company admin' with 'testAdmin@email.com'
Enter the user's email in the 'Email' field
Enter the user's password in the 'Password' field

testStage.description: Correct merchant ID is sent to the server

steps.name: Select '0820.070856 dashboard business unit' business unit using filter
Verify: correct merchant ID is sent to the server
